content.full_text:
For consideration by the Commission
on December 7, 8, and 9, 1977. For
information or comments, contact
Ted Prim, a staff attorney, at
(916) 322-6444.

DRAFT 1 TP:jo
November 23, 1977

PROPOSED REGULATION

18116. Reports and Statements; Filing Dates (81005)

Whenever the Political Reform Act requires that a

statement or report be filed prior to, or not later than a

specified date or during or within a specified period, and

the deadline falls on a Saturday, Sunday or official state

holiday, the filing deadline for such a statement or report

shall be extended to the next regular business day.

embedding.first_500_words: For consideration by the Commission on December 7, 8, and 9, 1977. For information or comments, contact Ted Prim, a staff attorney, at (916) 322-6444. DRAFT 1 TP:jo November 23, 1977 PROPOSED REGULATION 18116. Reports and Statements; Filing Dates (81005) Whenever the Political Reform Act requires that a statement or report be filed prior to, or not later than a specified date or during or within a specified period, and the deadline falls on a Saturday, Sunday or official state holiday, the filing deadline for such a statement or report shall be extended to the next regular business day.
embedding.summary: This is a proposed regulation (Draft 1) regarding filing deadlines under the Political Reform Act, proposing that when filing deadlines fall on weekends or state holidays, the deadline be extended to the next regular business day. The document was prepared for Commission consideration on December 7-9, 1977.
